channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Reviews Multilateral Ties After OPEC Exit, Rules Out Further Withdrawals
item.description: The UAE is reassessing its role in multilateral organizations after leaving OPEC but will not make additional withdrawals, a senior official said, as the Gulf state recalibrates its global position.

item.title: 🏭 European Aluminium Premium Doubles as Iran War Disrupts Middle East Supply
item.description: The premium for aluminium billet in Europe has doubled since the Iran war began due to supply shortages from the Middle East, squeezing manufacturers in construction and transport sectors.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelenskiy Vows to Keep Extending Range of Ukrainian Strikes Into Russia
item.description: Ukraines president said Kyiv would continue increasing the range of its strikes on Russian territory, posting footage of an attack on a target more than 1,500 km inside Russia.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia to Hold Victory Day Parade Without Military Equipment
item.description: Russias Defence Ministry said the May 9 parade on Red Square will proceed without military equipment displays, citing the operational situation in Ukraine amid concerns over drone threats.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Fed Chair Nominee Warsh Set to Clear Key Confirmation Hurdle
item.description: Kevin Warsh, President Trumps pick to lead the Federal Reserve, is poised to clear a procedural vote on Wednesday, setting the stage for him to succeed Jerome Powell as the White House exerts unprecedented control over the central bank.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanese Soldier Killed in Israeli Airstrike in Southern Lebanon
item.description: A Lebanese soldier and his brother were killed in an Israeli airstrike on a motorcycle in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. The incident marks another escalation in cross-border violence amid the ongoing Iran-Israel conflict.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's Growing Muslim Communities Face Resistance to New Mosques
item.description: Muslim leaders in Japan report growing opposition to new mosques, fueled by negative overseas coverage of Islam and online misinformation. The tensions reveal challenges as Japan's Muslim population expands.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia Passes Historic Law Protecting Domestic Workers
item.description: Rights groups are hailing Indonesia's new domestic worker protection law as a "new chapter," though activists warn that real change will take time due to entrenched beliefs. The law addresses long-standing labor rights issues.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚛️ IAEA Chief Confirms Iran Highly Enriched Uranium at Isfahan Site
item.description: UN nuclear agency head Rafael Grossi stated that Iran highly enriched uranium is still believed to be at the Isfahan site, amid ongoing concerns about Irans nuclear program during the US-Israel conflict with Iran.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ US Mandates Enhanced Security Checks for Immigration Applicants
item.description: The Trump administration has mandated enhanced security checks for immigration applicants, according to internal guidance sent to USCIS employees, tightening vetting procedures amid the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🌍💰 Standard Chartered and IFC Launch 300M Africa Supply Chain Finance
item.description: The World Bank IFC and Standard Chartered announced a new 300 million risk-sharing facility aimed at boosting supply chain finance across Africa amid global economic uncertainty.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🏛️ US Sets Conditions for UN Dues Including China Curbs
item.description: The United States has set specific conditions for releasing billions it owes the UN including cost-cutting measures and moves to counter China influence at the world body.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Announces Exit from OPEC and OPEC+
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has quit OPEC and OPEC+, dealing a major blow to the oil cartel and Saudi Arabia amid the ongoing Iran conflict and energy market volatility. The move could reshape global oil supply dynamics.

item.title: 🛢️ Brent Crude Hits One-Month High on Prolonged Hormuz Disruption Fears
item.description: Oil prices rose nearly 3% as Brent hit a one-month high following reports the US will extend its blockade of Iranian ports, likely prolonging supply disruptions from the Middle East.

item.title: 💵 Dollar Strengthens as Investors Await Fed Decision Amid Iran War
item.description: The dollar edged higher as markets awaited a key Federal Reserve rate decision in what may be Chair Jerome Powells final meeting, against the backdrop of an Iran conflict with no imminent resolution in sight.

item.title: 🥇 Singapore Pulling In Dubai Gold as Middle East War Drags On
item.description: Gold imports into Singapore from Dubai hit a record last month as wealthy investors seek alternative safe-haven storage hubs amid the prolonged Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 IRGC seizes wartime power as Irans Supreme Leader role diminishes
item.description: Two months into war with the US and Israel, Irans Revolutionary Guards have consolidated decision-making power, with Mojtaba Khamenei reduced to legitimizing generals decisions rather than issuing directives. The shift may harden Tehrans stance in any renewed talks with Washington.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Chinese research vessel departs near Japans southwest islands after two weeks
item.description: A Chinese research vessel departed waters near Japans Nansei Islands after a two-week presence, marking the third such incident in a month. Japans Defense Ministry is monitoring increased Chinese maritime activity near its southwestern islands.

item.title: 🇰🇷⚔️ KAI and Bell partner on South Koreas next-generation utility helicopter
item.description: Korea Aerospace Industries and Bell Textron signed a memorandum of understanding to develop South Koreas next-generation high-speed medium utility helicopter. The partnership advances Seouls military modernization amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇪🇺📱 EU charges Meta for failing to keep children under 13 off Facebook and Instagram
item.description: The European Commission issued preliminary findings that Meta breached EU digital rules by inadequately preventing children under 13 from accessing Facebook and Instagram, potentially exposing them to age-inappropriate content.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Hegseth Faces Congressional Grilling Over Iran War
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testifies before Congress for the first time since the Iran war began, facing questions about the .5 trillion defense budget, costs of the conflict, and military preparedness.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Sentences Ex-President Yoon to 7 Years
item.description: Ousted President Yoon Suk Yeol receives a 7-year sentence for resisting arrest and bypassing Cabinet procedures before his martial law declaration, adding to his existing life sentence for rebellion.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Taiwan Tops Agenda for Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: China considers Taiwan its 'core of core interests' as Beijing prepares for a summit with Trump, while the US remains the island's most important international backer.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Feels Economic Strain From Iran War
item.description: British consumer confidence slumps to two-year low as the Iran war drives price increases, with PM Starmer refusing US requests to use UK bases for strikes on Iranian infrastructure.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Accuses Meta of Failing to Block Underage Users
item.description: The European Union charged Meta with violating digital rules by not preventing children under 13 from accessing Facebook and Instagram, threatening fines up to 6% of global revenue.
